name: cube_red_sun
_comment: Red diffuse cube lit by a sun light from above-front-right. Cycles vs RPR should match within tolerance after gamma-encoded 8-bit quantization.
_tolerance_comment: Loose for now (current Cycles vs RPR rms ≈ 0.086 on this case). Cycles' setEnvironment is a stub so its background is the default world shader, not the case's env color; intensity/exposure mapping between backends also isn't calibrated yet. Goal: catch regressions, not absolute parity. Tightens to ~0.05 once env shader + intensity calibration land (Phase 3+).

environment._comment: Black env so both backends skip env light. Cycles' setEnvironment is currently a stub (default grey background); using black masks that gap. Once cycles_backend wires a real env shader (future), we can compare with arbitrary env colors.
